data: Fudgy Chocolate Brownies: Melt 1/2 cup butter and stir in 1 cup sugar, 2 eggs, and 1 tsp vanilla extract. Whisk in 1/3 cup unsweetened cocoa powder, 1/2 cup all-purpose flour, 1/4 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp baking powder. Spread evenly into a greased 8x8 inch baking pan. Bake at 350F (175C) for 20-22 minutes until a toothpick inserted comes out mostly clean.
